index.title: Roman Noris | Senior Full-stack Developer
index.description: Portfolio of Roman Noris - Senior Full-stack developer, expert in Next.js, NestJS, and modern architectural solutions.

hero.name: Roman Noris
hero.headline: Crafting digital solutions,
hero.subtitle: Architect of complex ecosystems and intelligent interfaces. Focusing on performance, scalability, and business results.

starwars.p1: In a world where code chaos hinders progress, one developer challenges mediocrity.
starwars.p2: Roman Noris builds architectures that withstand the test of time and scale, turning complex requirements into elegant solutions.
starwars.p3: From refined interfaces to powerful server systems—every byte serves the purpose of creating a flawless product.
starwars.p4: The future is here. It is written in clean and efficient code...

about.status_text: Roman is open to interesting offers and strategic partnerships.
about.p1: I specialize in developing high-load systems and premium interfaces. My philosophy is a rejection of standard templates in favor of unique engineering solutions that run faster, look better, and bring real value to the business.
about.p2: Combining a modern stack of Next.js / NestJS with a deep understanding of business processes, I create products that become a competitive advantage.
about.m1: Maximum response speed and performance-driven solutions.
about.m2: Premium design and flawless user experience.
about.m3: Open to complex challenges and large-scale projects.

services.subtitle: I transform ideas into powerful technological tools using the most modern architectural approaches.
services.item_0_desc: High-performance, scalable, and visually stunning applications on React and Next.js.
services.item_1_desc: Cross-platform solutions with a native feel, developed on Electron or Tauri for maximum power.
services.item_2_desc: Fluid 120fps interfaces on React Native for both iOS and Android simultaneously.
services.item_3_desc: Eliminating human error through the development of bots, scripts, and CRON pipelines.
services.item_4_desc: Intelligent agents for instant interaction, notifications, and business logic management.

skills.subtitle: My stack is built around stability, speed, and future scalability.

projects.subtitle: Every case is the result of finding the perfect balance between functionality and aesthetics.

work_stages.label: Capabilities
work_stages.subtitle: From deep analysis to the final release, my development process is built on transparency and maximum efficiency.
work_stages.stage_1_desc: Deep analysis of business needs, database architecture design, and creating a solid roadmap.
work_stages.stage_2_desc: Creating premium, modern interfaces with a strong focus on user experience and conversion.
work_stages.stage_3_desc: Writing clean and highly performant code using Next.js and NestJS ecosystems.
work_stages.stage_4_desc: Detailed testing, speed optimization, and seamless deployment to production servers.

contact.subtitle: I am always ready for new challenges and value bold ideas. Write to me, and let's create something extraordinary.
contact.email_placeholder: Where should I send the reply?
contact.dynamic_web: What technology is on your mind?
